title: fix: disable gen edge rate limiter
author: voodoohop
pr_body_excerpt:
- Removes the production `EDGE_RATE_LIMITER` binding from `gen.pollinations.ai`.
- Lets the existing middleware skip Cloudflare native rate limiting when the binding is absent.
- Keeps staging/test rate limiter config unchanged.
- Validated with `npm run build:production` in `gen.pollinations.ai`.

gist.headline: Opening the floodgates
gist.blurb: We've disabled the edge rate limiter on our text generation API to keep the words flowing smoothly without interruption.
gist.summary: Removed the Cloudflare EDGE_RATE_LIMITER binding from the gen.pollinations.ai production environment in wrangler.toml.
gist.impact: Text generation API requests will bypass Cloudflare's native edge rate limiting, reducing unexpected throttling for high-volume traffic.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee opening a valve to let data flow freely, representing the removal of the rate limiter. Monitor Robot cheering.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee mascot turning a chunky valve on a retro pipe, releasing a glowing stream of lime green (#ecf874) data. A cute chunky pixel robot with a CRT monitor head cheers nearby. Soft pastel gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley, emotionally warm.
